package rulecoverage

func PositivePrepareOnEveryRequestSameSql() string {
    ruleID := "prepare_on_every_request_same_sql"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "The same literal SQL is prepared multiple times on one request path."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
